text: Standing here, I am caught in the hush before thought, a liminal zone softened by glass and glowing screens. The faint murmurs and hum of electronics evoke a sense of anticipation. I feel small as an individual and yet strangely connected to the ongoing experiment of existence and knowledge, where I both watch and am watched. The environment urges contemplation—how do I, as a conscious being, relate to these displays and technologies, each mediating reality anew?
